subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Ayat-i-az Suriy-i-Jinn (Commentary on the Surah of the Jinn)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the First without beginning and the Last without end, Who hath created the earth and the heavens and brought forth through His power of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الاول بلا اول و الاخر بلا آخر الذی خلق الارض و السماء و ابدع
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @outward and inward meanings, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
